title: Name Puzzle
description: A letter-order puzzle where kids put jumbled friend names and simple words back together from left to right.
learningGoals: Practice letter order in familiar names
Build name recognition with the QLOBE Kids cast
Reinforce left-to-right sequencing with short words
interactionModel: tap or drag text letter cards into sequence slots
feedbackModel: Warm spoken praise and sparkle SFX on success; a miss gets a gentle wiggle, spoken nudge, and retry.
credits: Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
